title: engines.engine_candidate_dismissed
description: ADR-040 Decision #7 — emitted when a previously-suggested engine candidate is dismissed. Three reasons per the bypass-without-friction principle: silent (founder ignored within window), explicit-no (founder said no), invoked-different-engine (founder ran a non-matching engine). Powers post-hoc accept-rate analysis via AS-CATCH-2. WS-298.

candidate_event_ref.description: Event id of the originating engine_candidate_suggested event

suggested_engine.description: Engine that was suggested (denormalized for analysis convenience)

dismissal_reason.description: silent = founder ignored suggestion within PRE_FILL_WINDOW_TURNS; explicit-no = founder declined; invoked-different-engine = founder invoked a different engine within the window

invoked_engine.description: When dismissal_reason='invoked-different-engine', the engine the founder actually invoked

elapsed_turns.description: Founder turns elapsed between suggestion and dismissal
